A massive fire in the Bronx destroyed 11 stores, while deep flooding on Rockaway Boulevard caused traffic issues; simultaneously, a multi-agency investigation dismantled a gun trafficking operation in NYC, highlighting ongoing public safety concerns amid recent violent incidents and legislative efforts to improve housing and health services.

### Risks & Alerts

- Massive early-morning Bronx fire on E. Gun Hill Road rips through 11 stores. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxQaUNZWnptNDBhTHdlUmVkTk9XT3BITy1OYjFVVlVlMmVoTTNvZWRYNjltRk1BX0dVU2ZtTF9kUWlERm9mbHZ0WVZiWjU4d3pwUDVXejFSSl81X3BtT2hJZkoyMHloSzE3QmFxcTNGQmp2X2xYS2RyTzVfWUJORS1KNmM0MUpUT1JtbHVJVmROeGZPVmxEajFnN3NZQ244cm9FemppUlg2clJzLUFLRFdWY3lmS3A?oc=5)
- Deep flooding on part of Rockaway Boulevard in Queens caused problems for some drivers. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
